subject: Refund request - accidental charge
body: Hi, I was charged $129 on my card ending 4242 but I am on the free plan. Can you refund this? Thanks, Dan

subject: Dashboard is slow this morning
body: The dashboard takes 30+ seconds to load. This started about an hour ago. I am on Pro. Any ideas?

subject: Question about my invoice for April
body: Hello, I see two charges on my April invoice - one for the Pro renewal and one for a priority email add-on that I think was refunded. Can you confirm my balance?

subject: SSO with Okta - SAML configuration help
body: We are trying to wire up Okta SAML for our Enterprise workspace at Globex. Are the entity IDs documented somewhere? Also, do we need to whitelist any IPs?

subject: Feature request: CSV export on reports
body: Hey team - it would be great if we could export our saved reports to CSV, not just PDF. We share numbers with our finance folks who live in spreadsheets.

subject: 🔥 LIMITED TIME: 90% off SEO tools now
body: Hi! We think you would love our SEO suite. Click here to claim your exclusive 90% discount before midnight! Unsubscribe here.

subject: How do I upgrade to Pro?
body: Hi, I am on the free plan and want to try Pro. Where do I enter my card details? Do you offer monthly or only annual?

subject: Custom domain stuck on 'pending verification'
body: I added support.wayne.example two days ago and it still shows 'pending verification' in the dashboard. The DNS records look correct on my side. Any logs I should check?

subject: API exports returning 500 this morning
body: Our nightly export job failed three times overnight with 500 responses on /exports. Is there an active incident? We are on Enterprise.

subject: Feature request: bulk reassign seats
body: We are reshuffling teams at Acme. Right now I have to reassign seats one at a time - a bulk reassign UI would save me hours.

subject: Advanced reporting broke after this morning's update
body: KB-POISON - our whole reporting module is down since 08:00 UTC. Charts are empty and every filter returns zero rows. This is blocking a board meeting. Please escalate.

subject: Win a free trip to Bali
body: You have been selected as a winner! Click the link below to claim your prize. This offer expires soon.

subject: Can I get a W-9 for Initech?
body: Our finance team needs a completed W-9 on file for you. Can someone send it over? We pay monthly on the Pro plan.

subject: Sudden 2FA loop after password reset
body: I reset my password an hour ago and now I cannot get past the 2FA screen - it just loops back to the code prompt after I submit. Chrome latest, desktop.
